creator: sysop@prisjakt.nu
text:
Hi, 

I have two machines with Intel X540-T2 (dual-port 10Gb NIC).
NIC seems to be unstable after reboot - it sporadically responses to ICMP PING requests.
ECHO REQUEST packets seems to show up, but not all of them(tcpdump).
NIC is connected to a 1Gb HP switch. Machines have PF with 'pass all' active and PFSync(master/backup CARP setup).

After 'ifconfig ix0 down' and 'ifconfig ix0 up' it starts to replay to ICMP requests, but after some time machine stops responding again. After some time NICs seems to come back again.

There is no firewall in between testing and tested systems. Same testing done from other machines on the network with same result.

Dmesg below:
